author: y4rr
content: Observation: FasterRcnn.forward() is monolithic — no public backbone/FPN accessors exist. MaskRcnn needs FPN features for mask ROI Align. Two options: (A) add pub forward_backbone + forward_fpn methods to FasterRcnn, (B) hold backbone/FPN/RPN/head directly in MaskRcnn (duplicates structure). Chose A: add helper methods to FasterRcnn. This adds ~30 lines, avoids duplication, and cleanly separates concerns.
